chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ مِنْ أَيْنَ تُؤْخَذُ وَ مِقْدَارِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 172 – The pebbles (for pelting) Al-Jamarahah, from where should these be taken, and their quantity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/141)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/141)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ الْتَقِطِ الْحَصَى وَ لَا تَكْسِرَنَّ مِنْهُنَّ شَيْئاً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad,f rom Ali Bin Al hakam, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Pick up the pebbles and do not break any of them’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Ali ibn abu Hamzah from abu Basir who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘Pick up the pebbles and do not break anything thereof.’”
